name: Cash Flow Forecast
description: Forecast incoming and outgoing cash so owners can see tight zones before they hit.

name: Burn Rate + Runway
description: Estimate monthly burn and runway using simple submitted inputs.

name: Funding Readiness Score
description: Directional score for revenue, cash flow, time in business, credit posture, documents, and debt load.

name: Cost Leak Detection
description: Spot subscriptions, vendor creep, and expense categories that need review.

name: Scenario Modeling
description: Model what happens if revenue drops, expenses rise, or hiring changes burn.

name: Weekly Financial Review
description: A repeatable owner review rhythm for cash, receivables, payables, debt, and decisions.

name: Monthly Advisor Memo
description: Plain-English memo summarizing financial posture, risks, and next actions.

name: Financial Snapshot
description: Quick owner-facing snapshot of cash flow, runway, readiness, and bottlenecks.
